definitions: A position in a sequence or series, typically one ordered on the basis of merit.

definitions: Throw (a ball) hard and low.

definitions: A small bright orange marine fish found off California.

definitions: A crowd of people pressed closely together.

definitions: A branch of medicine or surgery.

definitions: A thing resembling an eye in appearance, shape, or relative position.

definitions: Drive or cause to go in a specified direction.
